title: acer obtusatum subsp. tomentosum
intro: Acer obtusatum subsp. tomentosum, also known as the downy maple, is a subspecies of the Acer obtusatum plant, which is a type of maple tree native to certain regions of Europe. The downy maple is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the downy maple is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
